category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a flash utility for Atmel SAM microcontrollers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official shumatech/BOSSA repository using BOSSA capitalization.
docs_sources: Official shumatech/BOSSA repository README is the available official documentation surface from source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/shumatech/BOSSA; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Atmel SAM flashing; source_facts.executables lists bossac and bossash command-line tools.
